title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, discusses his bootstrapping journey to $10M ARR without external funding. The interview covers strategies for achieving $1M ARR milestones, reducing churn, product-led growth decisions, SEO and outbound tactics, pricing experiments, and when to consider raising capital.
